title.rendered: [Free Webinar] Why Sponsorships Are Key to a Lucrative Golf Fundraiser

content.rendered:
Date: Tuesday, March 28, 2023
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Logan Foote, Director of Sales at GolfStatus

Sponsorships are at the heart of a golf tournament’s fundraising power. While golfer registrations are an important piece of the golf event revenue puzzle, sponsorships are where nonprofits can get the most return. Whether you’ve never planned a golf tournament before or your long standing event’s revenue has plateaued, an intense focus on sponsorships can significantly boost your fundraiser’s revenue.

Gleaned from GolfStatus’ experience in powering thousands of nonprofit golf fundraisers, this webinar will discuss how nonprofits can leverage their golf tournament’s sponsorships to not only raise more money, but also open doors to broader partnerships, corporate relationships, and potential high capacity donors.

Attendees will hear why golf events have a unique advantage over other fundraising events, how to build and sell sponsorship packages that are a win-win for the sponsoring business and the benefiting organizations, and how technology gives nonprofits additional lucrative sponsorship options.

Designed for event planners of all experience levels, this free webinar will provide real-life examples and actionable next steps to maximizing your tournament’s sponsorships.

Key Takeaways:

  • How to craft attractive sponsorship packages for your golf event
  • Who to target for your golf fundraiser’s sponsorships
  • How to make the ask
  • Ideas for unique sponsorship options
  • How technology makes it simple

<<Register Now>>

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, please register and you will be sent a link to the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Also, visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
